creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: Hmm, so we were in linux_futex_wait(), presumably having slept (op 137 or 128 are present in the dmesg, but aren't the last ops, last op 129 is a wakeup).  We locked the chain before sleeping, and upon waking up we find we have the wrong chain locked.  So presumably curthread->td_umtxq.uq_key.hash changed while we were sleeping...
